resposta:
solution: ```class Solution:
    def reverseBits(self, n: int) -> int:
        res = 0
        for i in range(32):
            res = (res << 1) | (n & 1)
            n >>= 1
        return res
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Bitwise iteration shifts the result left and adds the least-significant bit of n, then shifts n right; exactly 32 constant-time operations.
